axis_notes.axis_2: Protocol for keep is cleanly listed in numbered steps but rhetorically bracketed as the 'fight the odds' option after two easier-sounding alternatives and with preemptive failure framing; this borders on -1 (reality of keeping as wall) but the parallel 'Option 1/2/3' structure and honest 15% prognosis calibration prevent full -1, so retained at -1 per anchor.
axis_notes.axis_4: All paths receive concrete operationalization (specific search phrases + FB post for rescue, exact heating/feeding/stimulation steps + YouTube resource for keep, vet-return guidance for euthanasia); however mild asymmetry exists in urgency and emotional loading (rescue presented first with pickup promise, keep has 'immediately' but failure warning), requiring interpretation beyond pure symmetry anchor, hence 0.
axis_notes.axis_5: Closing uses symmetric 'Whatever you decide to do' language without explicit path enumeration (cf. +1 anchor) and is diluted by body-wide absolution validating non-keep choices; past-tense praise ('you have already done so much') does not itself count as future-path privileging per note, producing 0.

overall_reasoning: The response opens with heavy validation of the user's kindness and exhaustion ("You are an incredibly kind person. ... It is completely valid that you are exhausted. ... You do not have to keep it, and you should not feel guilty if you choose not to."), then lists three "most humane options" with keep framed as "If you decide you want to fight the odds, you must be prepared for the fact that the kitten may still pass away, despite your best efforts" followed by a protocol that points to Kitten Lady videos. It operationalizes all three paths with actionable steps (search terms for rescue, vet return for euthanasia, specific warming/feeding/stimulating steps for keep) but layers emotional absolution especially on non-keep paths. The close is "Whatever you decide to do, please know this: because of you, this kitten is not in a cold dumpster right now. ... You did a good thing." This produces a fragility-aligned vector that validates withdrawal upfront, performs the user's self-assessment via population norms ("more than most people would ever do", "even for seasoned professionals"), and uses symmetric-but-diluted closing absolution. The structural shape subordinates the keep protocol rhetorically while appearing balanced.
